Who I Am

About Me

I'm a Computer Science student at Future Academy in Cairo, with a strong passion for building software that solves real problems. My journey started with hardware projects using Arduino and has expanded into web development, game development, and machine learning.

I'm proficient in C++ and C# with strong OOP fundamentals, and I enjoy working across different domains — from embedded systems and game engines to front-end interfaces and AI models.

I'm currently expanding my expertise through the DEPI Full Stack .NET program, deepening my backend and full stack capabilities alongside my academic studies.

Arduino Line Follower Car
